subcodes.first_line: O scion of His Holiness the Friend! Verily thou art glorious, and this is attested by thy nearness to the Court of Grandeur and thy attraction to the fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل حضرت خلیل حقا که جلیلی و دلیل بر آن تقرب بارگاه کبریا و انجذاب بنفحات
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @service to others; to the Cause of God
